variants: With a professional license in the form of the Starship Gardener Label, Jori Al Hamad specializes in innovative horticulture. Her work includes articles featured in the Patchwork Hedge Journal, where she explores the intersection of gardening and environmental stewardship. In her civic engagement, she serves as the Garden Program Coordinator Spruce Spring, fostering community participation in local gardening projects. Jori communicates effectively using the Georgian alphabet, which she frequently incorporates into her publications. She is an alumna of the Keystone Arts Conservatory, where her passion for gardening was nurtured and supported.
